summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Beyonet dual-skin landing page. All core functionality working correctly including skin toggle, responsive design, and accessibility features.
passed_tests: Page loads with Picture Company skin (dark background, serif font) by default
Toggle button shows 'MEDIA' on picture skin with correct aria-pressed='false'
Clicking toggle switches to Media Company skin (light background, sans-serif font)
Toggle button shows 'PICTURE' on media skin with correct aria-pressed='true'
Clicking toggle again returns to Picture Company skin
Email 'hello@bayon.et' visible under both company names
No 'Made with Emergent' badge or forbidden text found anywhere
Company name heading centered on both skins (desktop 1920x1080)
Mobile view (390x844): title wraps cleanly, toggle accessible, email visible
Very small screen (320x568): everything fits without overflow or cropping
Landscape mobile (844x390): all elements visible and accessible
Toggle button has correct aria-label for accessibility
Both background canvas elements exist in DOM (background-canvas-picture, background-canvas-media)
Toggle functionality works correctly on mobile devices
No console errors detected during testing
All required DOM elements present with correct data-testid attributes
